sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28733" key="dusare/sthma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσᾰρέστ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, Medic., <sense id="n28733.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">malaise, distress</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.37.15</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
